claim: Context priming is a technique where you load your project structure into Claude Code at startup by having it read essential files and run 'git ls-files' to understand the codebase
actionable: Add a context priming prompt to your project README that Claude Code reads at startup to immediately load critical codebase information.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: MCP servers provide two types of capabilities: collectors (fetch information like Firecrawl for web scraping) and executors (perform actions like file edits or database updates)
actionable: When designing MCP workflows, classify each tool as a collector or executor and chain them: collect context first, then execute based on collected data.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: Claude 3.7 Sonnet now has a new text editor tool specifically for precise file editing in agents, which is critical for building effective coding agents
actionable: Use Claude's text editor tool for precise file modifications instead of relying on file replacement or sed-like commands.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: The token-efficient tool use beta flag in Claude 3.7 reduces token consumption in agent loops (showed ~5.6% reduction in tests)
actionable: Enable the token-efficient flag when using Claude 3.7's tool use to reduce API costs in agentic workflows.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: You can add MCP servers to Claude Code using JSON configuration format, making it faster than using the interactive wizard if you know the configuration
actionable: Copy the JSON configuration for an MCP server and paste it directly with 'claude mcp add' using your clipboard to quickly add servers.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: MCP servers can have built-in slash commands with predefined prompts that reduce setup time for common tasks
actionable: Look for MCP servers with pre-built prompts accessible via slash commands to reduce prompt engineering overhead.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: Thinking tokens in Claude enable more complex reasoning; you can access them via 'think', 'think harder', or 'ultra think' modes in Claude Code
actionable: Use thinking modes in Claude Code for complex agentic tasks that require deep reasoning or multi-step planning.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)

claim: Building systems that build systems multiplies engineering impact; agentic coding with tools like Claude Code enables this exponentially higher leverage
actionable: Focus on building reusable agents and systems rather than one-off scripts to scale impact.
source_title: My TOP 6 Claude Code PRO tips for AI Coding (MCP + Agents)
